name: Startup Machine
description: AI startup builder: provide a one-line idea, a domain, or a repo, and a fleet of specialized AI agents researches competitors, sizes the market, drafts a pitch deck, and delivers a decision-ready founder brief with a go/no-go recommendation.

skills.name: Founder Brief Preview
skills.description: Generate an instant recommendation, key risk, and first market read from an idea, domain, or repo. No account required.
